inline_comments.message:
we shouldn't add this method to the API of ArtifactDataDefinition,it's not a common method that we want to expose.
We can add this method as a private function in CsarUtils.

I'm actually trying to shrink the size of `ArtifactsBusinessLogic` and to encapsulate the state of `ArtifactDataDefinition` (in other words to prevent unnecessary exposure of its state). In the future, this method may be a private one. The overall goal is to maximize the "Tell don't ask" principle and the Law of Demeter:

- https://martinfowler.com/bliki/TellDontAsk.html
- https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Law_of_Demeter
- https://pragprog.com/articles/tell-dont-ask
- https://softwareengineering.stackexchange.com/questions/157526/explanation-on-how-tell-dont-ask-is-considered-good-oo

So for now, could we keep this as is until we get a better idea about the behaviors assigned to `ArtifactDataDefinition`? Maybe we'll figure out another object but for now I rather centralize what interacts with its state, and to encapsulate whatever possible.
